method: Chrome DevTools Protocol against the current local static export, disabled cache per route, desktop and Lighthouse-like mobile throttling; single run per route/profile
limitations: Single lab run, not field CrUX data
INP unavailable because no representative interaction was executed
LCP and CLS are PerformanceObserver values captured two seconds after load
Network conditions are synthetic and local machine load is uncontrolled
